title: Perform complex tests to measure engineering properties of materials
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform complex tests to measure engineering properties of materials demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Interpret and schedule test requirements

pcs.text: Review test request and sample documentation to identify required test parameters and intended use of bulk material
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review test request and sample documentation to identify required test parameters and intended use of bulk material?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review test request and sample documentation to identify required test parameters and intended use of bulk material.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and workplace control measures associated with the sample, preparation/testing methods and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and workplace control measures associated with the sample, preparation/testing methods and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and workplace control measures associated with the sample, preparation/testing methods and equipment.

pcs.text: Inspect samples, compare with specifications, record and report discrepancies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect samples, compare with specifications, record and report discrepancies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect samples, compare with specifications, record and report discrepancies.

pcs.text: Liaise with client when samples and/or request forms do not comply with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with client when samples and/or request forms do not comply with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with client when samples and/or request forms do not comply with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Match required parameters with suitable test methods, available equipment and instrument specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Match required parameters with suitable test methods, available equipment and instrument specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Match required parameters with suitable test methods, available equipment and instrument specifications.

pcs.text: Plan parallel work sequences to optimise throughput of multiple sets of samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan parallel work sequences to optimise throughput of multiple sets of samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan parallel work sequences to optimise throughput of multiple sets of samples.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Interpret and schedule test requirements

elements.title: Prepare and measure test specimens

pcs.text: Prepare test specimens in accordance with test method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare test specimens in accordance with test method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare test specimens in accordance with test method.

pcs.text: Conduct preliminary measurements to establish initial dimensions and conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct preliminary measurements to establish initial dimensions and conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct preliminary measurements to establish initial dimensions and conditions.

pcs.text: Store test specimens and residual sample materials to maintain their integrity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store test specimens and residual sample materials to maintain their integrity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store test specimens and residual sample materials to maintain their integrity.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare and measure test specimens

elements.title: Check equipment before use

pcs.text: Set up equipment/instruments in accordance with test method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set up equipment/instruments in accordance with test method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set up equipment/instruments in accordance with test method.

pcs.text: Perform pre-use and safety checks in accordance with workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform pre-use and safety checks in accordance with workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform pre-use and safety checks in accordance with workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Identify faulty or unsafe components and equipment and report to appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify faulty or unsafe components and equipment and report to appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify faulty or unsafe components and equipment and report to appropriate personnel.

pcs.text: Check calibration status of equipment and quarantine out-of-calibration or faulty items
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check calibration status of equipment and quarantine out-of-calibration or faulty items?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check calibration status of equipment and quarantine out-of-calibration or faulty items.

pcs.text: Clean, care for and store equipment and consumables in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, care for and store equipment and consumables in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, care for and store equipment and consumables in accordance with workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Check equipment before use

elements.title: Test samples

pcs.text: Position and secure test specimen in test equipment/instrument
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Position and secure test specimen in test equipment/instrument?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Position and secure test specimen in test equipment/instrument.

pcs.text: Conduct preliminary measurements to determine optimum test conditions and instrument settings
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct preliminary measurements to determine optimum test conditions and instrument settings?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct preliminary measurements to determine optimum test conditions and instrument settings.

pcs.text: Perform each measurement stage in sequence, terminating each stage at the appropriate end point
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform each measurement stage in sequence, terminating each stage at the appropriate end point?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform each measurement stage in sequence, terminating each stage at the appropriate end point.

pcs.text: Record all test measurements, observations and factors that may impact on quality of results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record all test measurements, observations and factors that may impact on quality of results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record all test measurements, observations and factors that may impact on quality of results.

pcs.text: Remove test piece and conduct post-test measurements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove test piece and conduct post-test measurements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove test piece and conduct post-test measurements.

pcs.text: Shut down equipment and store used test pieces in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Shut down equipment and store used test pieces in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Shut down equipment and store used test pieces in accordance with workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Test samples

elements.title: Process and analyse data

pcs.text: Confirm data is the result of valid measurements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm data is the result of valid measurements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm data is the result of valid measurements.

pcs.text: Perform required calculations and ensure results are consistent with estimations and expectations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform required calculations and ensure results are consistent with estimations and expectations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform required calculations and ensure results are consistent with estimations and expectations.

pcs.text: Record results with the appropriate accuracy, precision and units
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record results with the appropriate accuracy, precision and units?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record results with the appropriate accuracy, precision and units.

pcs.text: Estimate and document uncertainty of measurement in accordance with workplace procedures, if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate and document uncertainty of measurement in accordance with workplace procedures, if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate and document uncertainty of measurement in accordance with workplace procedures, if required.

pcs.text: Analyse trends in data and/or results and report out-of-specification or atypical results promptly to appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse trends in data and/or results and report out-of-specification or atypical results promptly to appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse trends in data and/or results and report out-of-specification or atypical results promptly to appropriate personnel.

pcs.text: Troubleshoot procedure or equipment problems which have led to atypical data or results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Troubleshoot procedure or equipment problems which have led to atypical data or results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Troubleshoot procedure or equipment problems which have led to atypical data or results.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Process and analyse data

elements.title: Maintain laboratory records

pcs.text: Make entries on report forms or into a laboratory information management system accurately calculating, recording or transcribing data as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make entries on report forms or into a laboratory information management system accurately calculating, recording or transcribing data as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make entries on report forms or into a laboratory information management system accurately calculating, recording or transcribing data as required.

pcs.text: Ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results.
